Class StandingOrderExecutionService

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.service.StandingOrderExecutionService
@Service public class StandingOrderExecutionService extends Object
Service that processes due standing orders and creates Transaction entities via the existing transaction pipeline. Designed so that both the daily scheduled task and the simulation environment can call executeAllDueStandingOrders(LocalDate) with the appropriate date.

  • Constructor Details

    • StandingOrderExecutionService

      public StandingOrderExecutionService()

  • Method Details

    • executeAllDueStandingOrders

      public void executeAllDueStandingOrders(LocalDate processingDate)
      Queries all active standing orders whose nextExecutionDate <= processingDate and creates transactions for each due execution. Each standing order is processed independently; a failure in one does not affect others.
      Parameters:
      processingDate - the date up to which standing orders are processed (typically today)

    • processSingleStandingOrder

      @Transactional public List<StandingOrderFailure> processSingleStandingOrder(StandingOrder so, LocalDate processingDate)
      Processes a single standing order, iterating through all due execution dates (catch-up loop). For each scheduled date, builds and saves a transaction, then advances the standing order to the next execution date. Failures are collected and returned (not saved) to avoid issues with rollback-only Hibernate sessions.
      Parameters:
      so - the standing order to process
      processingDate - the upper bound date for execution
      Returns:
      list of failures encountered during execution (empty if all succeeded)

    • computeNextExecutionDate

      public static LocalDate computeNextExecutionDate(StandingOrder so, LocalDate lastScheduledDate)
      Computes the next execution date based on the standing order's repeat configuration.
      Parameters:
      so - the standing order
      lastScheduledDate - the last scheduled date (before weekend adjustment) from which to advance
      Returns:
      the next scheduled date

    • resolveDayInMonth

      public static LocalDate resolveDayInMonth(LocalDate date, PeriodDayPosition dayPosition, Byte dayOfExecution)
      Resolves the day within a month according to the period day position setting.
      Parameters:
      date - the date with the correct year and month
      dayPosition - SPECIFIC_DAY, FIRST_DAY, or LAST_DAY
      dayOfExecution - the specific day (1-28) for SPECIFIC_DAY position, may be null
      Returns:
      the date with the resolved day-of-month
